name: agent-orchestrator
description: Local multi-agent orchestrator (Mastra + optional Inngest) — PoC bootstrap

scripts.analyze:eslint: pnpm run lint:base && pnpm run lint:sonar
scripts.quality: pnpm run pin:check && pnpm run typecheck && pnpm run lint && pnpm run analyze:deps && pnpm run debt:guard && pnpm run size:guard && pnpm run structure:guard && pnpm run architecture:guard && pnpm run coverage && pnpm run coverage:istanbul && node scripts/fallow-with-coverage.mjs
scripts.ci: concurrently -g -n "tc,eslintcore,eslintsonar,cov,deps,debt,size,struct" -c blue,green,cyan,magenta,yellow,red,white,gray "pnpm run typecheck" "pnpm run lint:base" "pnpm run lint:sonar" "pnpm run coverage" "pnpm run deps:cruise" "pnpm run debt:guard" "pnpm run size:guard" "pnpm run structure:guard" && pnpm run coverage:istanbul && node scripts/fallow-with-coverage.mjs && concurrently -g -n "t0,wide" -c yellow,red "pnpm run mutation:t0" "pnpm run mutation:wide"
scripts.ci:seq: pnpm run pin:check && pnpm run typecheck && pnpm run lint && pnpm run analyze:deps && pnpm run debt:guard && pnpm run size:guard && pnpm run structure:guard && pnpm run architecture:guard && pnpm run coverage && pnpm run coverage:istanbul && node scripts/fallow-with-coverage.mjs && pnpm run mutation:t0 && pnpm run mutation:wide
scripts.inngest:devstack: concurrently -k -n serve,dev -c cyan,magenta "pnpm run inngest:serve" "pnpm run inngest:dev"
